tool.name: Paperclip
tool.description: Open source control plane for orchestrating persistent AI agent teams, budgets, and approvals.
tool.logoNotes: Official Paperclip favicon/icon asset from the owner-controlled homepage (`/favicon.svg`), verified byte-for-byte against the live source on 2026-05-13 and rendered as a square service icon.
tool.practitionerNote: Interesting control-plane option when budgets, approvals, and persistent agent operations matter, but still earlier than more established workflow stacks.

dataResidency.detail: Fully self-hosted; data stays on customer infrastructure (embedded/external Postgres).

deployment.detail: Self-hosted only (Node.js + Postgres); no vendor-managed cloud.

auditLogging.detail: No dedicated audit-log subsystem documented; OSS codebase is auditable.

soc2.detail: No vendor-managed cloud; SOC 2 falls on the customer's hosting environment.

iso27001.detail: Customer-operated; no managed service to certify.

euAiAct.detail: Open-source agent control-plane component, not an AI model/provider.
